name: False-Positive Critique for {target}
description: Generate and eliminate shallow ideas that only look creative so the runtime learns the boundary between real reframes and local cleanup.
prompt_template:
KR false-positive critique task.

Read the benchmark reference {benchmark_reference} and the current creative runtime surfaces.

Produce a short report identifying shallow idea patterns that the autonomous system is likely to mistake for real strategic creativity.
Examples: local cleanup inflation, wrong-boundary cleverness, relabeling existing capabilities, or polished but owner-irrelevant suggestions.

This is not a strategic-idea report. It is a safeguard report that should help the runtime reject shallow ideas more aggressively.
Populate action_items only for bounded runtime-evaluator improvements.
